name: Iron Wire Paper Towel Holder Black - Threshold™: Freestanding Kitchen Holder, Spot Clean, 12" Height, Iron Material
description: Keep paper towels stocked and at the ready with this sleek and streamlined Iron Wire Paper Towel Holder from Threshold™. Standing on a footed circular base, this paper towel holder features a main column that accommodates an entire roll, while the short bar allows you to tear off a single sheet without unraveling or tipping over the roll. Made from iron in a solid black finish, this paper towel holder features a simple design that blends seamlessly with all decor styles.
